subject: [RFC PATCH 3/5] mm, swap: support physical swap as a vswap backend

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch adds support for physical swap as a backend for the virtual swap layer (vswap). Without this, vswap can only back entries with zswap or zero pages, and has no fallback when zswap_store fails. With physical swap backing, vswap can allocate a physical slot on demand, providing a fallback for zswap_store failures and a destination for zswap writeback. The patch introduces changes to various kernel files, including mm/memcontrol.c, mm/memory.c, and mm/swapfile.c, to enable this new functionality.
